title: cyclosorus tibeticus
intro: Cyclosorus tibeticus, also known as Tibetan fern or Himalayan button fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus tibeticus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, as well as its potential to act as a natural antibacterial agent. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are commonly consumed in traditional medicine practices in the Himalayan region.
